title: Excalibur Rentals
description:
Excalibur Rentals is dedicated to providing reliable rental equipment services, ensuring that c
lients can complete their jobs safely, on time, and within budget. They offer a range of equipm
ent including boom lifts, telehandlers, and light towers.

We will upload 45gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal information (name, addresses, SSN
s and so on), contracts and agreements, a bit of financials, customers info, etc.
